name: Fluffy Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate as much corn as possible by rubbing the ears of corn against a grater.
2. Scrape the corn with a table knife to remove any remaining juice.
3. In another bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff.
4. Heat 1/4 cup vegetable oil in a skillet over moderate-high heat.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the grated corn.
6. Spoon tablespoonfuls of the corn and egg white mixture into the hot oil.
7. Fry until golden brown on each side, turning gently if needed.
8. Sprinkle with salt.
9. Serve immediately while very hot.
